chapter_title: Bushfire Attack Level and Shelter in Place assessments
snippet: In addition to condition assessments, the Rolling Facilities Evaluation will conduct a review of Bushfire Attack Level and a Shelter in Place assessment for schools on the Bushfire at Risk Register. These assessments are being undertaken to ensure that all schools on the Bushfire at Risk Register receive regular and consistent assessments to determine the bushfire risk level of the school and improve the ember resistance of designated Shelters in Place.
